commit 762bf397ae5e0895b7d5172d69876ab904d0ecd7
Author:     Daniel Engberg <diizzy@FreeBSD.org>

Commit:     Daniel Engberg <diizzy@FreeBSD.org>

    net-p2p/libbt: Deprecate and set expiration date to 2024-03-31

    Last release in 2007 and no active development, lacks functionality
    found in modern implementations.
    Redirect users to net-p2p/libtorrent-rasterbar or
    net-p2p/libtorrent-rasterbar2

    PR:             276980
    Approved by:    portmgr (maintainer timeout, 2+ weeks)

 net-p2p/libbt/Makefile | 3 +++
 1 file changed, 3 insertions(+)
